value.found_quote: Build AI agents that autonomously read files, run commands, search the web, edit code, and more. The Agent SDK gives you the same tools, agent loop, and context management that power Claude Code, programmable in Python and TypeScript.
value.rationale: The page is Anthropic's official documentation for the Claude Agent SDK, describing it as a library to build production AI agents with Claude Code, available in Python and TypeScript with installation instructions. It is presented as a current, generally available offering.
